title: Cobblemon - RPG Edition
description: A Cobblemon modpack completely based on the RPG!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/COBBLEMON_RPG/COBBLEMON_RPG_Header.webp) A Cobblemon RPG-focused modpack where training Pokémon is only part of the journey. Classes, skills, quests, dungeons, bosses, and a world packed with structures turn every playthrough into a true adventure. Great for both singleplayer and servers. ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/COBBLEMON_RPG/COBBLEMON_RPG_Description.webp) Your progression actually matters. Choose RPG classes, level up skills, complete quests, explore dangerous dungeons, and face enemies and bosses that require preparation and strategy. Combat feels more dynamic, loot is meaningful, and every upgrade has a clear purpose. The world is heavily expanded with new structures, towns, ruins, and overhauled biomes, encouraging exploration at every step. You’ll find multiple progression systems, unique gear, magic, weapons, and plenty of ways to customize your playstyle, both in and out of combat. Cobblemon is fully integrated into the RPG systems, making training, battling, and exploring feel connected rather than separate. On top of that, the modpack includes many quality-of-life and performance improvements to ensure a smooth experience in both singleplayer and multiplayer. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/COBBLEMON_RPG/COBBLEMON_RPG_Screenshots.webp) ![screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rPl0spi3/images/961f75046100ed780b7f520ecc0b2f8e49468c4e.png) ![screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rPl0spi3/images/ccef10fa084b57fafb1b603a0f0b360bb29f0b93.png)
